articles.author: Caitlin McCormack
articles.title: Tyrese Haliburton’s bride-to-be shares heartbreaking tribute after her ‘once-in-a-lifetime friend’ dies on bachelorette trip - New York Post
articles.description: Indiana Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton’s fiancée shared a touching tribute on Wednesday honoring her best friend who unexpectedly died during her lavish St. Barts bachelorette trip.
articles.content:
